violations.description: COOLING OF POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (5 pts): Cooked salsa noted not being adequately cooled to prevent the growth of harmful bacteria.
COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): Cold holding unit by the range in the facility being used for cold holding temp of 41 degrees F was not functioning adequately.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): The hand washing lavatory noted with no hot water provided.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Cutting board not properly maintained. Can opener noted not properly maintained.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): A covered waste receptacle was not provided in the women's toilet room.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the kitchen under equipment especially behind the range noted in need of cleaning. Ceiling tiles noted with wet stains.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): reach in cooler by range noted with thermometer not in a conspicuous location.
INSECT RODENT ANIMAL CONTROL (3 pts): Insects noted infesting the food service establishment.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution. Sanitizer bucket should be set up in the food prep area as well.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling tiles noted with wet stains and damaged in need of replacement.
